name: Christmas Eggnog Cherry Nut Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped red or green maraschino cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Mix egg, eggnog, and oil. Stir in dry ingredients, mixing well. Fold in nuts and cherries after they have been coated with flour.
3. Pour into greased and floured 8 x 4-inch loaf pans.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 to 50 minutes or until tested done.
5. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pans.
